creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Alastair Hogge from comment #69)
lang/python38 still exists in the tree (despite expired status) so this needs to be capped at 75.3.0 for now, as 75.4.0 and later drop support. I personally run the latest upstream locally. Many Python packages that specify version ranges for setuptools only specify a major version so temporarily capping at an older minor shouldn't be too much of an issue.
